title: Sunshine of Paradise Alley
writer: Josephine Quirk, George W. Ryer, Denman Thompson
actors: Barbara Bedford, Kenneth MacDonald, Max Davidson
plot: A wealthy banker wants to tear down a tenement slum to build a factory, but a charming girl who lives there starts to persuade him to change his mind. A crooked bank employee and one of the tenement dwellers are stealing bonds fro...
